creator: p9711422@mmu.edu.my
text:
upgrade galeon to latest version 0.9.5

Fix: [root@nuzrin /usr/ports/www]# diff -ruN galeon/ galeon-new/
PORTNAME=      galeon
-PORTVERSION=   0.12.4
+PORTVERSION=   0.12.5
 CATEGORIES=    www gnome
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}
How-To-Repeat: None
